_meta.purpose: Permanent social feed posts for The Underdark. Loaded at startup and merged with locally-generated gallery posts. Posts here are git-committed and visible on all instances. Local (session) posts live in state.socialData.localPosts and can be exported via the feed export button.
how_to_add_a_post: type 'image' requires a 'src' (public URL — not an idb: ref).
type 'text' shows caption only, no media.
charId must match a character id in data/index.json.
Set permanent:true on all hand-authored posts.
Commit and push — the post will appear on all instances immediately.
